name: Catlyn's Chocolate Zucchini Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup sour milk (a tsp of vinegar added to milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
2. Grease a 9x13 inch pan.
3. In a bowl, cream butter and eggs. Add oil, vanilla, and sugar. Blend well.
4. Sift together cocoa, flour, baking soda, baking powder, cloves, and cinnamon. Add to the butter mixture alternately with milk. Mix until just combined.
5. Add zucchini and chocolate chips.
6. Bake for 40 to 50 minutes.
7. There is no need to frost this cake. If desired, sprinkle powdered sugar on top of the cooled cake.
